title: Linecraft
description: Minecraft, but You Can Only Walk in a Straight Line...
body:
This datapack is a little one, what it does is it limits you to moving around on a single block. A line of 0 X. Where you can only walk back, and forth. Very profesional. Cool. With custom stronghold generation. With it handling nether portals just fine. With options for particles too. So that you can get blaze rods without absurd luck, i made it so that blazes spawn in basalt deltas.

Inspired by:
